name: AI Production Operations Copilot - Scheduled Alert Generator

nodes.name: Every 15 Minutes
nodes.notes: Runs every 15 minutes by default. Change this schedule after import if you want faster/slower demo alerts.

nodes.name: Build Variable Incident Payload
nodes.notes: Edit config.targetWebhookUrl and config.approvalBaseUrl in this node after import. It rotates through several realistic production incident scenarios.

nodes.name: POST Alert To Copilot Webhook
nodes.notes: Calls the start webhook in the main Alert Triage workflow. Uses neverError so the next node can still summarize failures.

nodes.name: Summarize Webhook Call Result
nodes.notes: Creates a clean execution output so you can confirm whether the scheduled job successfully called the main workflow.
